name: Pass the Ticket for Lateral Movement
description: Detects Kerberos ticket injection used for lateral movement
query:
// Detect pass-the-ticket activity
// Trigger on Rubeus, mimikatz kerberos, or klist injection
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(kerberos::ptt|Rubeus.*ptt|Invoke-Rubeus|klist.*purge.*klist)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
